steps.term: fun G => fun oneG => fun mulG => fun invG => fun H => fun oneH => fun mulH => fun invH => fun f => fun hom_args => @Quotient.indProp.{u} G (@KerSetoid.{u,v} G H f) (fun (q1 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) => forall (q2 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f), @Eq.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMul.{u,v} G oneG mulG invG H oneH mulH invH f hom_args q1 q2)) (mulH (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q1) (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q2))) (fun (a : G) => @Quotient.indProp.{u} G (@KerSetoid.{u,v} G H f) (fun (q2 : @KernelQuotient.{u,v} G H f) => @Eq.{succ v} H (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMul.{u,v} G oneG mulG invG H oneH mulH invH f hom_args (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a) q2)) (mulH (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f (@KernelQuotientMk.{u,v} G H f a)) (@KernelQuotientToH.{u,v} G H f q2))) (fun (b : G) => @hom_mul.{succ u,succ v} G oneG mulG invG H oneH mulH invH f hom_args a b))
